suite_name.description: Human-readable name of the software suite

components.description: Source component folders to process together

path.description: Path relative to the directory containing this profile file

known_suite_patterns.description: Glob patterns matching suite-owned assembly names (e.g. 'MyApp.*')

known_third_party_patterns.description: Glob patterns matching known third-party assembly names (e.g. 'Newtonsoft.*')

unknown_default.description: Default action for assemblies that match neither suite nor third-party patterns

decompile_parallel_threshold.description: Number of passing assemblies above which decompilation splits into parallel batches

index_output_path.description: Path (relative to profile directory) where index-<component>.md files are written

context_output_path.description: Path (relative to profile directory) where <component>/<assembly>.ctx.md files are written

version_prompt.description: Question to ask the user for the version/release label when running process-drop
